calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Ora Prochovncik; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, Alan Horwitz representing the plaintiff, Archstone Communities.

Defendant John Metheny is present.
Attorney, Richard J. McPalmer representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 1390 Market Street, Apt. #1408, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of AUG-24-2009 is vacated.
